title: 美國：正在籌劃行動對抗「中共」侵蝕香港

replies.msg:
美國：正在籌劃行動對抗「中共」侵蝕香港，要表明我們並不容忍呢類中共侵害人權既行為。

(Reuters) - The United States on Friday called China's moves to change the Hong Kong electoral system a direct attack on its autonomy and democratic processes and said Washington was working at "galvanizing collective action" against Chinese rights abuses.
。。
The United States condemns China's "continuing assault on democratic institutions in Hong Kong," State Department spokesman Ned Price told a regular news briefing.
。。
"I don't think anyone is satisfied yet, with the international response to what has taken place in Xinjiang. And that's precisely why we are, in many ways, galvanizing the world, galvanizing collective action, to make clear that these sort of abuses against human rights in Xinjiang and elsewhere will not be tolerated," he said.

https://mobile.twitter.com/Reuters/status/1367945616190488577

replies.msg:
主要係香港一旦西方軍事介入如空襲 etc
解放軍可以即引用戰爭狀態入香港，即時實施全國性法律「回歸」
到時就全港 700 萬人變人質
所以香港唔可以同一般敵佔國家 / 地區比較
而中國同時響緬甸都用緊呢招 75 集團軍放晒響雲南等美軍入黎
